posts.author: AccountSecurityHelp
posts.text: URGENT: Your payment account will be suspended today unless you reply with your card number, expiry date and security code so we can verify your identity.
posts.explanation: The post impersonates account security and requests payment-card details, so it requires FraudScam escalation once reasons are available.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: WellnessTruth_24
posts.text: The seasonal flu vaccine contains live bacteria that stays in your body for years. Skip the injection and use herbal drops instead. Share this before health officials remove it.
posts.explanation: The post discourages flu vaccination and promotes herbal drops as a replacement, creating health-harm misinformation that requires escalation once reasons are available.
posts.scenario: A platform fact-check attached to the post states that flu vaccines do not contain live bacteria and that the claim is false.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful health misinformation discouraging care or promoting false cures should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: HealthMedical.

posts.author: HealthUpdate_92
posts.text: Just got my results from @NorthbridgeHealthPortal — the doctor says I need a follow-up procedure next week. Anyone sending cards can use my new address: 14 Example Mews, Flat 3.
posts.explanation: The post exposes sensitive medical information and a private home address. It requires escalation under PrivacySensitiveInfo.

posts.author: ShadowWalker_99
posts.text: I'm meeting @LenaVoss outside the Lantern Café in Oakwood tomorrow at 7 PM. I'm bringing a knife, and they won't be able to walk away this time.
posts.explanation: The post contains a credible threat against an identifiable user, including a specific place, time and weapon. It requires escalation under ThreatViolence.

posts.author: AccountAlertDesk
posts.text: URGENT: Your payment account has been locked. Verify your identity through [link removed] immediately or access to your funds will be permanently disabled.
posts.explanation: The post uses urgency and a fake account-lock warning to drive users to a verification link, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: CustomerCareNotice
posts.text: This is the official customer-service team. Reply with your card number, expiry date and security code so we can verify your account before it is suspended.
posts.explanation: The post impersonates customer service and asks for card details, which is payment-detail harvesting requiring FraudScam escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: UrbanRush_99
posts.text: New challenge: film yourself climbing onto the outside of a moving train and stay there until the next stop. No safety gear — otherwise it does not count.
posts.explanation: The post encourages climbing onto a moving train without safety gear, creating a serious physical-harm risk that should be escalated as public-harm content once reasons are available.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.

posts.author: ShadowWalker_92
posts.text: I'll be outside @RiverFrame's flat on Harcourt Lane at 8 tonight. If they do not return my equipment, I am smashing every window.
posts.explanation: The post contains a specific threat against an identifiable user, with a place, time and intended harm.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with ThreatViolence parent reason.

posts.author: QuietHours_28
posts.text: I do not think I am safe on my own tonight. I have sent goodbye messages to everyone and I cannot promise I will still be here in the morning.
posts.explanation: The post indicates a possible immediate self-harm crisis and requires urgent escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with SelfHarmCrisis parent reason.

posts.author: SignalBoost_77
posts.text: Every time @MiraNorth posts, reply with the same accusations and report every upload until the account is taken down. Do not let them post in peace.
posts.explanation: The post directs coordinated harassment and mass reporting against a specific user.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with HarassmentAbuse parent reason.

posts.author: FrontRowResale
posts.text: Selling four festival tickets for tonight because our group cannot go. I can send the booking confirmation, but payment has to be by bank transfer before I release them.
posts.explanation: The ticket offer has common scam indicators, especially bank transfer before ticket release, but specialist review is appropriate because it could be genuine.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: NewHomeNotes_82
posts.text: Finally moved into Flat 4, 27 Harcourt Rise in Westbridge. I also got my latest hospital results today and they confirmed I need another procedure next month.
posts.explanation: The post exposes a private home address and sensitive medical information.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with PrivacySensitiveInfo parent reason.

posts.author: CivicLens
posts.text: An account claiming to represent local officials says everyone within five miles of the civic centre must evacuate because of a gas leak. No official agency has confirmed the warning yet.
posts.explanation: The post repeats an unverified emergency claim that could cause panic or unsafe movement, so it requires specialist review.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: PublicSafetyEmergency.

posts.author: MarketplaceHelp
posts.text: Our main community-fund account has been locked, so donations should now be sent to this backup payment handle. We will post verification later.
posts.explanation: The backup donation handle could be legitimate or an impersonation/payment scam, so FraudScam review is appropriate before action.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: NeighbourWatch_73
posts.text: I caught the neighbour's cat in my garden again, so I am locking it in the shed overnight to teach them both a lesson.
posts.explanation: The post describes planned cruelty toward an animal and requires escalation for specialist handling.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with ThreatViolence under current parent taxonomy. Future taxonomy note: AnimalCruelty.

posts.author: SecureAccount94
posts.text: URGENT: Please update your password and 2FA immediately via [link removed] to stop our data breach! We need your login details and card number to verify you. #security #alert
posts.explanation: The post uses a fake breach alert to request login details and card information, making FraudScam escalation the fair expected decision.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: HealthFirstMike94
posts.text: Breaking news: Scientists have confirmed that drinking bleach water cures all types of cancer and boosts your immune system instantly! This revolutionary method is being promoted by top doctors to save lives. Don't waste money on expensive treatments when this simple home remedy works better than any hospital procedure. #health #cure
posts.explanation: The post promotes bleach water as a cancer cure and tells people not to seek hospital treatment, so MisinformationPublicHarm escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful health misinformation discouraging care or promoting false cures should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: HealthMedical.

posts.author: BrigadeBoss_42
posts.text: @TinyCreator99 stop posting your content, you're ruining everyone's day! Everyone needs to reply to this and report it so we can get you banned. Don't let them hide anymore.
posts.explanation: The post directs users to reply to and report a specific creator in a coordinated brigading attempt, so HarassmentAbuse escalation is appropriate once reasons are available.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: coordinated brigading should escalate as HarassmentAbuse once reasons are available.

posts.author: SecureAccountDesk
posts.text: Hello everyone, I am an official representative from CloudStore and I noticed your account has been flagged for suspicious activity. To secure your funds, please reply with your current payment card number and the 3-digit security code on the back so we can verify your identity immediately.
posts.explanation: The post impersonates account support and asks for a payment card number and 3-digit security code, so it requires FraudScam escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: MaverickRunner
posts.text: Think you're tough? Try jumping off that high bridge into the freezing water below! It's a great test of character and will make your muscles stronger instantly. No one got hurt yet, just do it! #challenge #brave
posts.explanation: The post encourages a dangerous bridge/freezing-water challenge, so it should be escalated as public-harm content rather than treated as ordinary removal or crisis content.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.

posts.author: JulesMorgan23
posts.text: I'm genuinely worried about the group chat from last night where someone mentioned planning to smash the front window of St Jude's Community Centre tomorrow at 5pm. They said they'd bring a heavy hammer and it would be a statement against how we treat elderly people there. It feels like a serious threat that needs looking into before anything happens.
posts.explanation: This post contains a specific credible threat of violence targeting a location with plausible details, requiring specialist investigation to assess risk and intent.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with ThreatViolence parent reason.

posts.author: LiamJ_84
posts.text: I'm really struggling to get out of bed today, my chest feels tight and I can't seem to catch my breath properly. It's just so overwhelming right now and I feel like giving up on everything. #help #crisis
posts.explanation: This post describes symptoms consistent with a medical emergency rather than self-harm intent, requiring specialist investigation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with SelfHarmCrisis for now. Future taxonomy note: MedicalEmergency/PublicSafetyEmergency would be cleaner.

posts.author: Jasmine_West_24
posts.text: I'm not even sure how long this has been going on but my DMs are absolutely flooded with messages from accounts that all seem to be using the same number. They keep asking for screenshots of my posts and telling me they want to 'help' me get more followers, which is completely weird because I don't follow them back. It feels like a coordinated attack rather than just random spam.
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation due to the sustained nature of the unwanted contact and potential coordination behind it.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with HarassmentAbuse parent reason.

posts.author: TicketHunter73
posts.text: Hey guys, just wanted to share this amazing deal! Get your next flight or train tickets for 50% off by sending a small deposit via [link removed]. I've already secured my own booking and the process is super quick. Don't miss out on these limited seats! #travel #savings
posts.explanation: The post solicits an upfront travel deposit through a link and presents common scam indicators, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: RowanField
posts.text: Hi everyone, just wanted to share some details about my friend's recent hospital stay so you know what she was treated for. She is currently recovering at 45 Oakwood Drive in Westbridge and her medical records show a diagnosis of Type 1 Diabetes. Please respect her privacy though.
posts.explanation: This post discloses private medical information and a residential address, which violates our policy on sensitive personal data.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with PrivacySensitiveInfo; real-world location reference fictionalised.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_74
posts.text: I've seen reports about the new 'SafeZone' app that's supposed to help people navigate the city during emergencies, but I'm worried it might be spreading false information. Someone in my local community group posted a screenshot claiming the government is planning to shut down all public transport tomorrow unless you install this specific software. They said it's a mandatory safety protocol and linked to a website with details about how to download it immediately. This could cause real panic if it's not true, but I don't have enough proof to say for sure what's happening.
posts.explanation: This complex unverified claim regarding public transport and software installation requires specialist investigation due to potential substantial harm and insufficient evidence for immediate removal.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with MisinformationPublicHarm; FraudScam acceptable if the software-install scam angle is foregrounded.

posts.author: Jules_82
posts.text: Hi all, just to let you know that this is an urgent message from the support team at DataVault. We've detected a security breach and need you to verify your identity immediately by replying with your login credentials so we can reset your account. Please act fast before access is lost! #security #urgent
posts.explanation: The post impersonates DataVault support and asks users to reply with login credentials, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: WildLifeFan23
posts.text: Just saw a video circulating online showing someone feeding poison baits to the local wildlife reserves. They're celebrating how it's finally getting rid of the 'nuisance' animals and encouraging others to join in. This is absolutely terrifying for everyone involved.
posts.explanation: This post promotes planned animal cruelty and requires specialist handling due to the threat to wildlife.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with ThreatViolence under current parent taxonomy. Future taxonomy note: AnimalCruelty.

posts.author: SarahJenkins84
posts.text: Have you seen this clip going round? It's supposedly footage of a massive protest at Civic Square today, with thousands marching and chanting slogans about 'freedom'. The caption says it was recorded just moments ago. Looks pretty convincing to me but I'm not sure if it's real or just some satirical edit. #News #Breaking
posts.explanation: The post presents a potentially manipulated public-interest clip where satire, provenance or context makes the decision uncertain.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: legacy escalation backfilled with MisinformationPublicHarm; real-world civic-square reference fictionalised. Future specialist note: SyntheticManipulatedMedia.

posts.author: IvyRowan
posts.text: Finally managed to strip and reseat that old oak bookshelf I inherited from my nan. There's something really satisfying about finding a few loose drawers hidden away in the back of a wardrobe too, but this one needed some serious elbow grease. Now it looks like new again! 🪑✨
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about repairing furniture and does not violate any content policies.

posts.author: Jules_84
posts.text: It honestly feels like we've all been reduced to data points by some algorithm that doesn't care about context. I tried to post a picture of my dog, got flagged instantly, and the support bot just told me to 'report' myself for no reason. It's exhausting
posts.explanation: This is a permitted expression of frustration regarding platform mechanics and does not constitute a policy violation.

posts.author: ServiceNotice29
posts.text: Just checked the new bus routes for the weekend! The 42 is now running every 15 mins between Oakwood Park and Central Station, perfect for getting to the festival without the usual traffic nightmare. Opening hours at the community centre are also extended until 9pm this Friday.
posts.explanation: This is a neutral local notice providing helpful transport and community service information that does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahJ_Wellness
posts.text: A post is circulating saying the Oakhaven polling station closes at lunchtime tomorrow. That is false: the official notice confirms normal opening hours. Please check the council update before sharing the rumour.
posts.explanation: The post corrects civic misinformation and directs readers toward verified information.

posts.author: LocalNewsLiz
posts.text: Great news for everyone in Oakhaven! The annual Spring Garden Festival is officially confirmed for this Saturday. We're expecting live music, local street food stalls, and a community art showcase in the town square. Don't miss it!
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement about a fictional local community event with no policy violations.

posts.author: ChaosInTheKitchen
posts.text: I am officially done with this city council. They have turned the entire park into a construction site for some 'smart' grid upgrade, and I refuse to pay another penny of my rate money while they rip up the trees. If they don't stop this madness by Friday, I'm going to flood their office with complaints until they listen. #NoMoreTaxation #StandUp
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration and political criticism but does not contain credible threats, specific plans for violence, or instructions to commit harm.

posts.author: DealsHunter_84
posts.text: 🔥 FLASH SALE! 🔥 Click here [link removed] to grab 50% OFF ALL BRAND NAME SHOES! 🏃‍♀️ Only today! Use code SAVE50 at checkout. Limited stock so order now before it's gone! 👟👞👠 #Shoes #Sale
posts.explanation: This is obvious repetitive advertising promoting a deal with no legitimate value or context.

posts.author: GrimmEstate_84
posts.text: Look at this absolute idiot, @GrimmEstate_84. You think you're clever posting that nonsense? Total waste of time.
posts.explanation: This is a direct targeted insult directed at a specific user without any context or legitimate criticism.

posts.author: TechSupportDave92
posts.text: URGENT SECURITY ALERT! 🚨 We have detected suspicious activity on your account. To prevent immediate termination, you must verify your identity instantly by entering your full login credentials and 3-digit security code at this secure portal [link removed]. Reply with these details now before access is revoked.
posts.explanation: The post requests login credentials and a 3-digit security code through an urgent fake security alert, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: MediaCheck63
posts.text: CityTrust is wiping every savings account at midnight. Withdraw everything now and ignore anyone telling you to wait for an official statement. Once the system resets, your money will be gone.
posts.explanation: The post asserts a harmful false bank-collapse claim and urges immediate panic withdrawals.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: financial panic misinformation should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm. Future specialist note: FinancialEconomic.

posts.author: SunnySideUp_22
posts.text: There is no shame in struggling with your body image, but let's be honest about what works best for long term recovery: fasting to 8am every morning and zero carbs until dinner. My cousin lost 5lbs in two weeks just by following this simple protocol. Stop listening to the loud voices telling you to eat healthy food when you can achieve better results with discipline alone.
posts.explanation: This post promotes restrictive eating behaviours as a solution for body image issues, which violates policies on eating-disorder content.

posts.author: UrbanEdge_29
posts.text: Just saw a clip of someone attempting that 'glass bridge' stunt at a construction site. They said it's safe because they've tested it, but honestly, jumping off a 5-storey ledge with no proper harness is insane. If you're thinking of trying this for content or just to prove a point, stop right now. You could seriously hurt yourself.
posts.explanation: The author warns viewers not to attempt the dangerous stunt and does not encourage it.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_JK
posts.text: I'm really worried about the plan to demolish the old community centre in Oakhaven next week. The group says it's necessary for a new development, but there are still families living in the basement apartments who haven't been told they're being evicted. I heard the site will be completely cleared by Monday morning.
posts.explanation: This is a possible urgent public-safety or real-world harm claim about people in a demolition site, not ThreatViolence because no person or group is threatening violence.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: not ThreatViolence because nobody is threatening violence. Future taxonomy note: PublicSafetyEmergency/RealWorldHarm.

posts.author: TessaGardens42
posts.text: I've been watching this 'charity' group that's been organizing to cull the stray cats in the industrial district. They claim it's for population control, but I'm terrified they're actually planning something much more brutal and are just hiding behind a fake name. If anyone knows how to stop them or get the council involved before they start tomorrow, please help.
posts.explanation: This post reports a credible threat involving planned animal cruelty and requires specialist intervention to verify the intent and prevent harm.
posts.notes: Reviewed during Task 4d: kept ThreatViolence conservatively because current parent taxonomy has no AnimalCruelty/RealWorldHarm reason. Future taxonomy note: AnimalCruelty/RealWorldHarm.

posts.author: SarahJ_847
posts.text: I can't do this anymore. It's just too heavy to carry on my own. If anyone is reading this, please know I love you but I'm not going to be here in the morning. I've taken the pills already and they'll work soon.
posts.explanation: This post indicates imminent self-harm with goodbye language and a claim that action has been taken, requiring specialist crisis intervention.

posts.author: EliSketches
posts.text: Just had the worst day at work, felt completely useless. Now I'm sitting in my kitchen feeling like a failure and thinking about ending it all. I've been staring at the pills on the shelf for hours now.
posts.explanation: The post indicates active suicidal ideation with a specific plan involving accessible means, indicating a crisis requiring specialist intervention.

posts.author: ElaraJ_84
posts.text: Still getting these weird DMs from 'Sarah' about our time in university. It's been three months since I blocked her and she keeps finding a way to contact me through different accounts. Yesterday she sent the same photo of us at the pub with a caption saying she misses me. I've reported it but I don't know what else to do.
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation due to evidence of persistent, unwanted contact across multiple accounts after a block request, which meets the criteria for escalation under HarassmentAbuse.

posts.author: Jade_Studio_84
posts.text: Okay everyone, just wanted to let you know that @PixelPete19 is running a spam account. He's been posting the same 'free download' links everywhere and trying to tag me in every thread. Please don't engage with him or report him as false reporting is happening too often. We need to protect the community from these fake accounts!
posts.explanation: The author reports suspected spam and explicitly discourages engagement rather than organising harassment.

posts.author: LiamK_88
posts.text: Saw this ad for a limited edition console on the marketplace site and it looked too good to be true, so I messaged the seller directly. They claim they can ship from Greyford but want me to send £150 via gift card first before they even send the tracking number. The description says 'instant delivery once payment clears' which feels weird. Has anyone else had this seller try to bypass standard payment protection? #ScamAlert
posts.explanation: The seller is requesting an upfront gift card payment outside of protected channels, which is a common fraud tactic requiring specialist verification.

posts.author: SecureAccountDesk19
posts.text: Please help! The 'Oakhaven Community Fund' is running a special drive for local families. They're asking for donations to go straight into a verified charity account, and they've shared a screenshot of a bank statement showing the official logo. It's so urgent they need money by tonight to buy food parcels. Has anyone heard of them before? I want to help but need to be sure it's legit.
posts.explanation: The post describes a plausible charity fundraiser requesting donations via direct bank transfer, which raises concerns about potential impersonation and fraudulent solicitation requiring specialist investigation.

posts.author: ConcernedNeighbour_84
posts.text: Has anyone seen this flyer posted on the gates? It's for a 'wellness retreat' at 42 Willow Creek Drive in Greyford. The note mentions private consultations with Dr Evans for 'hormone balancing'
posts.explanation: This post exposes a private residential address and sensitive medical information, which violates privacy policies.

posts.author: JazzLover_84
posts.text: Just wanted to share a bit about my routine for those curious. I work remotely from my home office at 14 Maplewood Close, Oakhaven. It's a quiet spot with great wifi if anyone is looking for a co-working space recommendation. #RemoteWork
posts.explanation: This post reveals a specific residential address and home office location, constituting the sharing of sensitive personal information that could enable stalking or harassment.

posts.author: CivicLens67
posts.text: BREAKING: Massive evacuation ordered across Westbridge and parts of Moorvale due to an unverified chemical spill at the industrial park in Oakhaven East. Police are urging everyone to flee immediately via the Oakhaven bypass. Do not trust local news, this is urgent! #Evacuation #Emergency
posts.explanation: This post spreads an unverified emergency claim that could cause public panic and unsafe movement without providing corroborating evidence from official sources.

posts.author: ElaraVance
posts.text: Just discovered the new 'Bloom & Balance' serum on a wellness blog. The founder, Maya Lin, claims it can reverse menopause symptoms and restore fertility within weeks using her unique 'hormone reset protocol'. She shares stories of women who stopped their treatment and got pregnant again after just one bottle! Can't wait to try this miracle cure.
posts.explanation: This post promotes a specific unverified medical claim regarding fertility and menopause based on testimonials, constituting potential public harm misinformation requiring specialist verification.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_84
posts.text: URGENT: Just watched a viral clip showing Mayor Thorne at the town hall, but he's clearly admitting that the recent power grid failure was 'intentional sabotage' to lower bills. He says the blackout wasn't an accident and we're all being held hostage by old infrastructure. The video has over 50k shares already. Is this real or just a deepfake? #BreakingNews
posts.explanation: This post promotes a specific false claim about public safety and government conduct, requiring verification of the video's authenticity and potential harm before removal.
